title: day-strategy-guardrails.v1
description: DAY-428 Guardrails for a permissionless Strategy (Strategy Lead allocation policy). Fail-closed: assets + Yield Opportunity allowlist + max allocation required; custody none; owner exit always; depositableLive/onChainFactory false until live factory epic. Product language: Strategy / Strategy Lead / Guardrails / Yield Opportunity — not DAY vault product.

name.description: Optional human label for the Strategy Guardrails set

assetAllowlist.description: Deposit assets allowed (e.g. USDC, SOL). Non-empty required.

opportunityAllowlist.description: Yield Opportunity ids this Strategy may allocate into (leaf venues/adapters). Non-empty required.

maxAllocationBps.description: Max share of Strategy AUM into any single Yield Opportunity (1..10000 bps). 10000 = 100%.

maxAllocationMicros.description: Optional absolute cap on Strategy AUM (micros string). null = unset.

maxPerOpportunityMicros.description: Optional absolute cap per Yield Opportunity (micros string).

ownerExitAlways.description: Constitution: owner can always EXIT principal

agentMayWithdrawPrincipal.description: Agents / Strategy Lead automation cannot redeem principal

custody.description: No team / server intermediate custody of principal

depositableLive.description: Scaffold fail-closed: never true without write path + WRITE_GO + on-chain Strategy factory

onChainFactory.description: No on-chain Strategy factory contract in DAY-426/427/428 prepare-only scaffold
